scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,jobs,talent,challenge,messaging -c cyan,green,blue,magenta,yellow,red "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix jobs-service" "npm run dev --prefix talent-service" "npm run dev --prefix challenge-service" "npm run dev --prefix messaging-service"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix jobs-service && npm install --prefix talent-service && npm install --prefix challenge-service && npm install --prefix messaging-service
